overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban environment beneath massive highway overpasses. The character passes the Arasaka corporate tower, navigates covered walkways, and approaches a secure corporate entrance with red illuminated barriers. The scene features bright morning sunlight creating strong shadows, light vehicular traffic, and industrial cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway near corporate headquarters

events.description: character turns left at intersection to continue along sidewalk under overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the highway overpass, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive black corporate skyscraper with illuminated white Arasaka logo vertically displayed
massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars creating deep shadows
wide staircase with metal railings leading up to the overpass level
metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive highway overpass with the iconic Arasaka corporate tower dominating the left side. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal road barrier, with vehicles passing on the right. Strong morning sunlight streams in from the side, creating dramatic shadows under the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing other pedestrians and approaching the Arasaka facility entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and dark jacket walking in the same direction along the right side

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge or entrance structure with Arasaka corporate branding
tall industrial utility poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires
large industrial structures with scaffolding and construction elements visible

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the path continues under the sprawling highway infrastructure. The Arasaka tower is now behind, replaced by views of industrial buildings and utility poles lining the street. The character passes another pedestrian while maintaining a steady pace along the shaded walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate security entrance with checkpoint barriers

events.description: passing the Arasaka security entrance with illuminated red barriers and corporate logo

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the secured Arasaka facility entrance, continuing along the industrial street

entered.detail: secure entrance checkpoint with glowing red barrier gates and illuminated Arasaka signage overhead
yellow construction cranes and industrial equipment visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The walkway leads to the Arasaka security entrance marked by glowing red barriers and prominent corporate signage. After passing the checkpoint, the path continues alongside the road with construction cranes visible in the distance, still under the shadow of the massive highway overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey beneath a massive highway overpass, transitioning from a wide urban vista dominated by a corporate monolith to a secure industrial checkpoint. It begins on a concrete sidewalk with the Arasaka corporate tower looming to the left, while strong morning sunlight casts dramatic shadows across the road and passing vehicles. As the camera turns left, the tower recedes behind the viewer and the environment shifts toward a shaded walkway lined with utility poles and industrial buildings. The path then leads directly toward an Arasaka security entrance marked by glowing red barriers and corporate signage. Finally, the camera passes through the checkpoint and continues along the roadside, where distant construction cranes emerge under the lingering shadow of the sprawling highway infrastructure.
